'''Bongo Scouts''' were variants of the [[Tribubble bongo/Legends|Tribubble bongo]] and were used as submersible light [[Frigate/Legends|frigates]] by the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]]. They were armed with one [[Booma/Legends|booma]] launcher, and featured a propeller and two bubble-like [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpits]] set apart from each other, where the [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]] sat. They were first used around [[3000 BBY]] during the [[War of the Gungan tribes]] and cost 90 units of [[Carbon/Legends|carbon]] and 20 units of [[Nova crystal/Legends|nova crystals]]. These frigates were constructed at [[Shipyard (water)|shipyards]] by the [[Bongomeken Collective]].

==Behind the scenes==
Bongo Scouts appear in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and its [[2002]] [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|expansion pack]]. They are the Gungan frigate units.
